name: AttnRes + LeakyReLU² + Legal Score-First TTT + Parallel Muon
blurb: Adds Full Attention Residuals (AttnRes, Kimi Team): learned softmax depth-attention over all preceding layer outputs replaces fixed x0 global residual injection. 11×512d pseudo-queries, zero-init, ~22KB overhead. Built on 2026-03-23 stack: LeakyReLU(0.5)² + legal score-first TTT + Parameter Banking + Parallel Muon + BigramHash(1536). Pending benchmark run.
author: abaybektursun
